message:
feat(spork/bench): add baseline performance benchmarks (bd-12vyy)

Reproducible Criterion benchmarks for core Spork operations using
deterministic inputs (fixed seed=42) for cross-run comparability.

GenServer:
- call_roundtrip: full request-response cycle (~45μs)
- cast_fire_and_forget: 10 async fire-and-forget messages (~40μs)
- spawn_server: server creation cost (~37μs)

Registry:
- register_single: single name registration (~195ns)
- register_100_unique: 100 unique names (~23μs)
- whereis_hit/miss: successful/failed lookup (~10ns/4ns)
- register_unregister_cycle: full lifecycle (~198ns)

Supervisor:
- restart_plan_one_for_one_3_children (~102ns)
- restart_plan_one_for_all_5_children (~365ns)
- restart_plan_rest_for_one_5_children (~323ns)
- compile_supervisor_10_children: topology compilation (~3.9μs)

Harness:
- empty_app_lifecycle: full start→quiesce→stop cycle (~48μs)
- lab_runtime_create: runtime construction baseline

Registers spork_baseline benchmark in Cargo.toml with harness = false
for Criterion's custom test runner.

Run with: cargo bench --bench spork_baseline

Closes bd-12vyy

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -217,6 +217,10 @@ harness = false
 name = "golden_output"
 harness = false
 
+[[bench]]
+name = "spork_baseline"
+harness = false
+
 [lints.rust]
 # Default to deny for unsafe code - specific modules that require it can use #[allow(unsafe_code)]
 # The epoll reactor requires unsafe for the polling crate's FFI operations
